name: Apple-Pecan Pound Cake
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Granny Smith apples; peeled and diced fine
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix sugar and oil, add eggs and beat well.
2. Combine flour, baking soda, and salt in a separate bowl.
3. Add the flour mixture to the beaten egg mixture. Stir in vanilla extract, apples, coconut, and pecans. Mix until everything is well combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased tube pan.
5. Bake at 325°F for 1 hour and 20 minutes.
6. Allow the cake to cool to room temperature before removing from the pan.
